MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BRIAN LYNCH MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Mario Valladares's motion to be relieved as counsel for Plaintiff Brian Lynch, which is unopposed, is GRANTED.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)
